Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE LUMENARIS GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is granted. The court construes the motion as also seeking discretionary relief. Plaintiff demonstrates excusable neglect and the dismissal is vacated. Plaintiff shall pay $500 to defendants as reasonable fees and costs. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to November 18, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
